design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash('Text message AI assistant|use_case|people who want to text an AI assistant instead of opening another app|2026-07-06T01:54:10.997584+00:00') → hero=workflow-command-center, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, implementation-checklist, source-card-dossier], gsap=[card-stacking, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: Hero grabs attention with SMS-first promise; proof via market context and sources; desire via reusable computer-use cache examples; action via strong CTA. Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk. Hero Math Verification: max-width 1120px, clamp sizing ensures 2–3 lines. Bento Density Verification: compare/bento grids use grid-auto-flow: dense. GSAP Motion Selection: card stacking on scroll, hover physics on cards. Label Sweep & Button Check: all CTAs point to Super login; competitors mentioned; contrast verified.
headline: Text message AI assistant that actually does the work

site_brief.audience: people who want to text an AI assistant instead of opening another app
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Text message AI assistant', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
site_brief.title: Text message AI assistant
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super turns SMS-style requests into real computer actions, follow-ups, reminders, and app workflows

summary: A practical field guide to using Super as a text message AI assistant—send simple messages, trigger real computer actions, and reuse a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time.
